honesty_notes: Strict 4-of-4 concordance plus |log2FC| ≥ 1 found no concordant signal in serum cytokines (OSD-575), urine inflammation (OSD-656), stool microbiome (OSD-630), CBC clinical labs (OSD-569), snATAC-seq, or V(D)J. This is a high-bar filter; absence here likely reflects inter-individual variability rather than absence of biological effect.

Pooled DE results (OSD-570 snRNA-seq, OSD-571 plasma panels, OSD-574 spatial transcriptomics) report cohort-level changes only — no per-subject test was possible because the upstream data are pre-aggregated.

panels.label: Microbiome shifts: capsule → crew → barrier
panels.intro_md: The strongest concordant signal in the Inspiration4 data lives in the microbiome. Skin and oral swabs (OSD-572) shifted in the same direction across all four crew members at multiple body sites. Capsule-surface taxa (OSD-573) detected during flight overlap meaningfully with the crew shifts. Skin barrier transcriptomics (OSD-574) shows a downstream pooled response.

views.title: Skin barrier transcriptomics (post vs pre, pooled)

panels.label: Systemic molecular changes
panels.intro_md: Where the per-subject filter found cohort-concordant signal in blood and where pooled DE captured systemic changes that single-subject testing could not.
